title: phymatopteris erythrocarpa
intro: Phymatopteris erythrocarpa, also known as the Red-stemmed Lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its reported anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Phymatopteris erythrocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
